statement_html:
Factoriser le polynôme \(P(x)=expand(-1(denominator(-3/4x-denominator(-3/4)(-3)/4)(denominator(-3/5)\times x-denominator(-3/5)(-3)/5)(denominator(-1/4)\times x-denominator(-1/4)(-1)/4)))\) en remarquant que \(P(-3/4)=0\) et \(P(-3/5)=0\).<br class="spacer">

\(P(x) =\)<oef-input name="reply 1" width="300"></oef-input>
